misc: Rarely uses his driver, which has raised questions about his masculinity.
biography: Ossi, a Kullo Golf Club member, brings a unique flair to the greens. Known for his strategic play and calm demeanor, Ossi is a formidable competitor in any tournament he enters.

While Ossi's skill is undeniable, he has raised eyebrows among spectators and fellow golfers alike due to his peculiar aversion to using a driver. Despite the whispers and questions about his masculinity, Ossi remains unfazed, proving that true strength lies in unwavering self-assurance and unconventional tactics.

With three past appearances at the Hector Trophée, Ossi is looking forward to the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, where he hopes to leverage his experience and unique playing style to finally capture the coveted title.
